🚨 Did You Know? Throwing electronics in the trash is illegal in Colorado due to their toxic materials 🚨

That’s where we come in.

Declutter your electronic waste, responsibly.

We come to your door, pick up your old, broken, or unwanted electronics, and make sure they’re recycled — not landfilled. For an affordable $25 flat fee that covers all your electronics and pickup, Juett Tech Rescue makes electronic recycling Easy and Convenient.

THE PROCESS

How It Works & What You Get

No drop-offs. No hassle. We handle everything from your doorstep to responsible recycling.

1

Schedule Online

Fill out our simple form — tell us what you have and when works for you.

2

We Come to You

We show up at your Boulder address on your preferred day and collect your electronics — door to door.

3

Secure Wipe & Recycle

Your data is professionally wiped from any devices that store it, and everything is responsibly recycled through certified e-waste systems.

4

Get Paid / Give Back

We may pay you a portion of profits if any items are resold. A portion (10%) of profits from every pickup is donated to Basel Action Network (BAN).

ban
BASEL ACTION
NETWORK

Proudly Supporting Basel Action Network (BAN)

Fighting illegal e-waste dumping and advocating for responsible electronics recycling worldwide.

One flat fee covers everything — no sorting required. Check out our Pricing Section below for details.

  • Rechargeable batteries & power banks
  • DVD/Blu-ray players & streaming devices
  • Projectors & presentation equipment
  • Small appliances — toasters, blenders & coffee makers
  • And most other electronics & tech accessories

ABOUT THE FOUNDER

Hi, I'm Natalie

Natalie Juett
20 years old · Born in Dallas TX

I am a current sophomore at CU Boulder studying economics and political science. During my first semester of sophomore year, I took an Environmental Sustainability and Features course, where I learned about the serious effects of e-waste on our environment when electronics are disposed of improperly.

After researching what disposal options actually existed in Boulder, I found a real gap: there's no affordable, convenient pickup service specifically focused on residential e-waste. Most options require a trip to a drop-off facility, or charge $35–$89+ just to come to you. We are the only e-waste targeted waste management service in the Boulder area. Juett Tech Rescue exists to fill that gap, offering a simple $25 flat fee pickup that makes responsible recycling easy for anyone.

The facts are striking: the world generates over 50 million metric tons of electronic waste every year, making it the fastest-growing solid waste stream on the planet. When electronics end up in landfills, toxic materials such as lead, mercury, and cadmium leach into the soil and groundwater, posing serious risks to both human health and local ecosystems. At the same time, rare and valuable metals like gold, silver, and cobalt are permanently lost rather than being recovered and reused.

I love our planet, and the goal of this business is to ensure its preservation and environmental safety through the proper disposal of e-waste. At the same time, I am committed to giving back, with 10% of profits from every pickup donated to Basel Action Network (BAN), a nonprofit dedicated to fighting illegal e-waste dumping and advocating for responsible recycling worldwide. While helping the Earth, I also hope to do my part in making the world a better place through this partnership.

FURTHER READING — E-WASTE & ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACT
Global E-waste Monitor 2024 (ITU & UNITAR) — 62 million tonnes of e-waste generated in 2022; less than 23% formally recycled
World Health Organization — “Electronic Waste (E-Waste)” Fact Sheet — health impacts of improper e-waste disposal
U.S. Environmental Protection Agency — Sustainable Materials Management Electronics Challenge — recovery of rare materials and certified recycling
Global E-waste Statistics Partnership (GESP) — international e-waste data, classifications, and reporting indicators
